zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan於1535年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，她的父親Robert Castell25歲，母親Constance33歲。她和William Payne II至少有2個兒子。她去世於1594年10月8日在英國素福爾可拉特萊斯登享年59歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆。

zh-hans.Rattlesden, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可拉特萊斯登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan于1535年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，她的父亲Robert Castell25岁，母亲Constance33岁。她和William Payne II至少有2个儿子。她去世于1594年10月8日在英国素福爾可拉特萊斯登享年59岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Joan was born in 1535, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Castell, was 25 and her mother, Constance, was 33. She had at least 2 sons with William Payne II. She died on 8 October 1594, in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan est née en 1535, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Castell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Constance, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec William Payne II. Elle est décédée le 8 octobre 1594, à Rattlesden, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan 1535 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Castell 25 und ihre Mutter Constance 33. Sie hatte mit William Payne II mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. Oktober 1594 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England und wurde in Lavenham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan è nata il nel 1535 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert Castell, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Constance, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con William Payne II. Morì il 8 ottobre 1594, nel Rattlesden, Suffolk, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラベンハム
ja.Rattlesden, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラットレスデン
ja.lifeSummary: Joanが1535年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Castellは25歳，母Constanceは33歳であった。彼女はWilliam Payne IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1594年10月8日にイギリススフォルクラットレスデンで59歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan(이)가 1535년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Castell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William Payne II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 10월 8일 영국 수폴크 래틀레즈든에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan nasceu em 1535, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Castell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Constance, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com William Payne II. Ela faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1594, em Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan родилась в 1535 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Castell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от William Payne II. Она умерла 8 октября 1594 г. в местности раттлесден, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan nació en 1535, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Castell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Constance, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con William Payne II. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1594, en Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
